About Me

The person behind
the strategy

I'm Mariam Saad, a Social Media Specialist with hands-on experience managing and growing social media accounts for restaurants, cafés, retail stores, and malls.

I focus on creating strategic and engaging content that helps brands attract customers, increase visibility, and build a strong online presence.

My approach combines creativity with marketing strategy to turn social media platforms into powerful tools for business growth.

Services

What I Offer

📱
Social Media Management

Managing social media accounts through strategic planning, consistent posting, audience engagement, and performance tracking.

🎯
Content Strategy

Developing monthly content plans tailored to the brand's goals, target audience, and marketing objectives.

🎬
Reels & Short-Form Content

Creating engaging reels ideas designed to increase reach, visibility, and audience interaction.

📣
Marketing Campaigns

Planning and executing promotional campaigns for events, product launches, and seasonal offers.

Process

How I Work

1
Brand Research

Understanding the brand, target audience, and competitors.

2
Content Strategy

Creating a clear content strategy aligned with business goals.

3
Content Creation

Developing engaging posts, reels, and marketing campaigns.

4
Performance Analysis

Tracking results and improving content performance.

Selected Work

West Arena Mall

Managed social media content for the mall including event coverage, promotional campaigns, and engaging posts designed to increase brand visibility and audience interaction.

The Challenge

The mall needed stronger social media engagement and more visibility for events, promotions, and store activities.

Strategy Focus

  • Event coverage
  • Promotional campaigns
  • Interactive posts
  • Reels showcasing mall experience

Content Execution

  • Reels highlighting events
  • Promotional posts for stores
  • Carousel posts for activities
  • Interactive engagement posts

Results Achieved

  • Increased engagement on posts
  • Higher reach through video
  • Improved brand visibility
  • Stronger audience interaction

Content Types

Post designsCarousel postsReelsCampaign visualsEvent coverage
